title: helixyra spiralis
intro: Helixyra spiralis, also known as the "snake vine," is a perennial climbing plant native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helixyra spiralis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and lowering blood pressure, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Helixyra spiralis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
